use_cases: Display status indicators with color-coded variants for user states or system conditions
Show category labels or tags for content organization and filtering
Present notification counts or numeric badges for badges of counts
Mark features or items with outline or filled styles in UI cards
Use as decorative labels with customizable styling via variant props
ai_summary: A reusable Badge component with multiple style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) using class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Supports focus states and hover transitions, making it suitable for displaying status labels, tags, and category markers across SaaS, e-commerce, and dashboard interfaces.
